text:
Created attachment 177889
Proposed patch (since 427751 revision)

Patch to update editors/focuswriter port from 1.6.2 to 1.6.3 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://github.com/gottcode/focuswriter/compare/v1.6.2...v1.6.3

The build tested on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64.
